title: stenogyne oxygona
intro: Stenogyne oxygona, also known as the 'Yellow Stenogyne', is a flowering plant species in the mint family, native to Hawaii. It has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing skin irritations. Stenogyne oxygona can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
